System Context Rules

Select a frame or component in Figma, then click to capture a screenshot and all design data (tokens, layer names, values). The result is sent to the AI via API for an accurate overview.

Enter your Storybook URL. We fetch /index.json to extract component and story names as naming rules. If CORS blocks the request, use "Paste index.json" below.

Paste index.json (CORS fallback)

Create an integration at notion.so/my-integrations, share your database or page with it, then paste the token and link here.

Saved scans

Save each scan to add it here. Bake Rules will merge all saved scans together.
